simple_types.name: Op_Kind
simple_types.code: type Op_Kind is (Op_Insert, Op_Delete, Op_Increment, Op_Decrement);

record_types.name: Operation

subprograms.name: Acknowledge
subprograms.code: procedure Acknowledge (Log : in out Op_Log; Up_To_Seq : Natural)

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: procedure Append (Log : in out Op_Log; Op : Operation)

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: function Get (Log : Op_Log; Index : Positive) return Operation
